title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Kotak Mahindra Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Kotak Mahindra Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Kotak Mahindra Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Kotak Mahindra Bank:
Kotak Mahindra Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kotak Mahindra Bank!
